creator: wollman@csail.mit.edu
text:
<<On Wed, 29 May 2013 19:34:09 GMT, timur@FreeBSD.org said:

> It's not a bug, it's a feature. MIT Kerberos shouldm't be a dependency
> at all and better been removed entirely.

Sorry, but that's not only totally wrong but a completely unacceptable
and unprofessional response.

-GAWollman
